description: A1: strip leading "failed to " from fmt.Errorf format strings via capture group
notes: pattern/replacement are CLI strings; pattern_ir/replacement_ir are fixture truth.
$MSG:/(?i)^failed to\s+(.*)/ matches the format literal; capture_group 1 binds $MSG to the suffix source range (open image: %w, no quotes).
CLI replacement $F("$MSG", $ERR) re-quotes that span; replacement_ir string/from_capture also quotes non-lit spans.
ok() has no failed-to prefix — must stay unchanged.
